hero.title: Make Web Data Collection
hero.description: AutoWDS is a powerful browser extension that lets you handle web scraping, automation, and workflow recording without coding, making complex data collection tasks much simpler and more efficient

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything to make data collection easier

visualSelection.title: Visual Selection
visualSelection.description: No coding required. Simply click any two elements in a list, and the tool can intelligently identify and summarize the list extraction rules with a true WYSIWYG experience

aiRecognition.title: AI Recognition
aiRecognition.description: No manual clicking required. AI algorithms intelligently understand page structure and list regions, then automatically recommend fields and extraction rules, greatly lowering the setup barrier and learning curve

autoPagination.title: Auto Pagination
autoPagination.description: Automatically identifies pagination buttons, next-page links, or load-more actions, then traverses all pages in batches to collect more complete datasets with one click

multipleFormats.title: Multiple Export Formats
multipleFormats.description: Export data to Excel, CSV, JSON, and other formats, making it easier to analyze, share, collaborate on, or connect with downstream business systems

recordActions.title: Action Recording
recordActions.description: Record clicks, inputs, and navigation steps in the browser, then automatically generate reusable automation scripts to improve the efficiency of repetitive tasks

deepCollection.title: Deep crawling
deepCollection.description: Start from list pages, enter detail pages, and continue drilling down through linked pages to extract structured field data from each level of the site

loginSupport.title: Login Support
loginSupport.description: Supports scraping content from websites that require login, with automatic handling of cookies and sessions for account-based collection scenarios

dynamicPages.title: Dynamic Pages
dynamicPages.description: Works well with modern websites built with Ajax, React, Vue, and other dynamic-loading frameworks, helping you reliably capture data after asynchronous rendering

scheduledTasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduledTasks.description: Create scheduled collection tasks to automatically monitor page changes and continuously capture the latest data in a timely manner

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.description: Save extraction rules to the cloud and sync them across devices, so you can continue working anytime whether you are in the office or on the go

useCases.title: Use Cases
useCases.subtitle: Find the perfect application for your industry

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Monitoring
ecommerce.description: Continuously monitor competitor prices, sales, reviews, and other key metrics so you can spot market changes early and adjust your operations strategy faster

market.title: Market Research
market.description: Quickly gather industry data and competitor insights, analyze market trends and customer feedback, and support business decisions with reliable data

content.title: Content Aggregation
content.description: Efficiently collect news, articles, and information from multiple websites to build personalized aggregation and content distribution platforms faster

research.title: Academic Research
research.description: Batch collect papers, patents, literature, and other academic resources to support topic selection, research organization, and follow-up analysis

recruitment.title: Job Information
recruitment.description: Aggregate job listings, salary ranges, and company information from major recruitment websites to help you screen opportunities more efficiently and find the right role faster

realestate.title: Real Estate
realestate.description: Batch collect property listings and analyze price trends, regional changes, and historical data to support rental, home-buying, and investment decisions

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Local extension + Cloud service, flexible to meet different needs
pricing.localPluginDesc: Run directly in your browser, simple and easy to use

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Join tens of thousands of users and start experiencing a simpler, more efficient, and more repeatable way to collect web data

footer.description: Make web data collection and browser automation simpler and more efficient

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest features and improvements of AutoWDS
